info.name: Bareqq Complete API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for all Bareqq endpoints

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Digital Marketing Strategy",
    "name_ar": "استراتيجية التسويق الرقمي",
    "description": "Complete digital marketing strategy with social media management",
    "description_ar": "استراتيجية تسويق رقمي كاملة مع إدارة وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي",
    "note": "Includes monthly reports and analytics",
    "note_ar": "يتضمن تقارير شهرية وتحليلات",
    "type": "subscription",
    "product_role": "strategy",
    "monthly_price": 500,
    "three_months_price": 1350,
    "six_months_price": 2550,
    "yearly_price": 4800,
    "category_id": 1
}

request.description:
Create a new product. For strategy products, include all duration prices:
- monthly_price: Price for 1 month
- three_months_price: Price for 3 months
- six_months_price: Price for 6 months
- yearly_price: Price for 1 year

For one_time products, use 'price' field instead.

query.description: Search by name, email, or phone
Filter by role: client, designer, marketer
Filter by product_role: one_time or strategy
Items per page (when pagination is true)

request.description: Get all products with English and Arabic descriptions for editing

Get single product content with separate English and Arabic fields for editing.

Response includes:
- name & name_ar (separate fields)
- description & description_ar (separate fields)
- note & note_ar (separate fields)
- All price fields (price, monthly_price, three_months_price, six_months_price, yearly_price)
- Full image URLs
- Category information

Example Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Product content retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Digital Marketing Strategy",
    "name_ar": "استراتيجية التسويق الرقمي",
    "description": "Complete digital marketing strategy",
    "description_ar": "استراتيجية تسويق رقمي كاملة",
    "note": "Includes monthly reports",
    "note_ar": "يتضمن تقارير شهرية",
    "price": null,
    "type": "subscription",
    "product_role": "strategy",
    "category_id": 1,
    "image": "https://user.bareqq.com/product_images/xyz.jpg",
    "background_image": "https://user.bareqq.com/product_images/bg.jpg",
    "monthly_price": 500.00,
    "three_months_price": 1350.00,
    "six_months_price": 2550.00,
    "yearly_price": 4800.00,
    "category": {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Marketing",
      "name_ar": "التسويق"
    }
  }
}

query.description: Items per page (when pagination is true)

Get single strategy tip content with English and Arabic descriptions

query.description: Filter by status: pending, approved, rejected
Filter by approval: true or false

formdata.description: REQUIRED: Client who will approve this post

request.description: Admin approves the post. Post needs approval from Client, Admin, and Marketer to be fully approved.
Marketer approves the post. Post needs approval from Client, Admin, and Marketer to be fully approved.
Client sees only posts assigned to them
Client adds feedback (comment) to post. Only works if post is not approved yet.
Client approves the post. Post needs approval from Client, Admin, and Marketer to be fully approved.
